indications.text:
NEVANAC™ ophthalmic suspension is indicated for the treatment of pain and inflammation associated
with cataract surgery.
NEVANAC® 0.1% is indicated for the treatment of pain and inflammation associated with cataract surgery.

NEVANAC* (nepafenac ophthalmic suspension), 0.1% is indicated for the treatment of pain and inflammation
associated with cataract surgery.

NEVANAC® ophthalmic suspension is indicated for the treatment of pain and inflammation associated with cataract
surgery.
